scripts.copyStaticFiles: copy src\settings.json dist && copy hp.cfg.override dist && copy .env dist && xcopy /s /i /y "./src/Data.Deploy/Scripts" "dist/dbScripts/"
scripts.copyStaticFilesLinux: cp src/settings.json dist && cp hp.cfg.override dist && cp .env dist && mkdir -p dist/dbScripts && cp -r ./src/Data.Deploy/Scripts/* dist/dbScripts/
scripts.stopContainer: docker rm -f voting-system-build-container && docker image prune -f && docker container prune -f
scripts.start: npm run build && set HP_INSTANCE_IMAGE=evernode/sashimono:hp.0.6.4-ubt.20.04-njs.20 && hpdevkit deploy dist
scripts.start1: npm run build1 && export HP_INSTANCE_IMAGE=evernodedev/sashimono:hp.0.6.4-ubt.20.04-njs.20 && hpdevkit deploy dist
scripts.build1: npm run removeDistLinux && npx ncc build ./src/startup.js -o dist && npm run copyStaticFilesLinux
scripts.build: npm run removeDist && npm run dockerBuild && npm run dockerRun && npm run fetchDist && npm run copyStaticFiles && npm run stopContainer
